identity.name: ARA Standard
identity.description: The official specification, tools, and Claude Code agents for the ARA (Agent-Ready Architecture) open web standard. ARA enables any website to be understood and interacted with by autonomous AI agents — reducing token consumption by 12.8x vs HTML parsing.

content_map.summary: ARA v1.0 specification: 3-layer architecture (Discovery, Understanding, Interaction), 4 sector examples, 2 CLI tools (ara-validate, ara-generate), 4 Claude Code agents (ara-auditor, ara-transformer, ara-enforcer, ara-monitor)

resources.label: ARA v1.0 Specification
resources.description: Full technical specification for the 3-layer ARA architecture — manifest, schemas, actions

resources.label: Implementation Examples
resources.description: Ready-to-use ARA manifests for e-commerce, SaaS, media, and restaurant sectors

resources.label: CLI Tools
resources.description: npx ara-validate (score A-F) and npx ara-generate (manifest generator from HTML/JSON-LD) — zero dependencies

resources.label: Claude Code Agents
resources.description: 4 agents covering full ARA lifecycle: ara-auditor (audit), ara-transformer (generate), ara-enforcer (enforce), ara-monitor (measure GEO impact)

meta.note: This repository is itself ARA-ready — we eat our own dog food.
